name: Light Anchor
long_description:
Brands have always been bottlenecked by how fast people can operate them. With agents that automate processes end-to-end, that bottleneck disappears, and a different kind of consumer business becomes possible: one where the cost and speed of operating it aren't capped by humans.

Light Anchor builds fully autonomous e-commerce. We own and operate our own brands today, each run by agents across marketing, sourcing, operations, and support.

Each brand runs on its own stack of agents: a CEO agent that sets weekly priorities and manages the budget, a GM agent that owns the P&L, merchandising, sourcing, and support, and a Marketing agent that handles creative, acquisition, and the content calendar.

Each operates with independent decision-making, memory, policies, and proposals specific to the brand. Every brand we run feeds the platform with new operating data, so the next brand we launch starts smarter than the last.
